name: Chicken Broccoli Parmesan
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into cubes.
2. Heat the oil in a skillet.
3. Cook the chicken and onion until the chicken is browned and the onions are tender.
4. Stir in the cream of mushroom soup, milk, and sherry.
5. Add the mushrooms, broccoli, and Parmesan cheese.
6. Reduce heat to low.
7. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
8. Serve over hot cooked spaghetti.
